title: Getting Started
content: Welcome to our service! Here's how to get started: 1) Create account. 2) Verify email. 3) Add payment method. 4) Create API key. 5) Read documentation. 6) Start building!

title: Pricing and Plans
content: Free: $0/month, 100 requests/hour. Pro: $29/month, 1000 requests/hour, priority support. Enterprise: Custom pricing for large scale. All plans include 99.9% uptime SLA.

title: Contact Support
content: Get help through multiple channels: Email: support@company.com (24-48h response). Chat: Available 9am-5pm EST. Phone: Enterprise plans only. Community forum: General questions.

title: Service Status
content: Check service status at status.company.com. We post updates about incidents, maintenance, and performance. Subscribe to status page for notifications. We aim for 99.9% uptime.
